meaning: n.<法语>经常逛林荫大道的人,闲荡者,花花公子
examples: It is one thing to call someone a neat and careful dresser. It is another to call that person a dandy, or a clotheshorse, or a boulevardier.
This French comedian turned to the cinema in 1905, creating the first widely popular comic character "Max", an aristocratic, skirt-chasing boulevardier.
Every year at Davos, Boulevardier Bob throws a party.
